content.rendered:
Turn Ad Spend into Revenue with

PPC Management Services

Ready to launch your next PPC campaign? 1111 Media Group builds ads that deliver results. You set the budget—we maximize every dollar.

Book Strategy Call ➜
Book Strategy Call ➜
/ Paid Search Experts

Certified Google + Microsoft Partners

As a Certified Agency Partner across all major search engines, we’re not new to this game. Our team of Certified Ads specialists will work with you to maximize your PPC advertising budget. We fine-tune your paid search campaigns for peak performance, hitting your ROI targets spot on.

Request a Quote ➜
Request a Quote ➜
/ Paid Ads solutions

Our PPC Management Services

Google Ads (Formerly Adwords)

Made up of specialists and strategists with years of Google Ads experience, our PPC management team utilizes technology and creativity to increase visibility and more sales at a profitable CPA (cost-per-acquisition) and reduced CPC (cost-per-click).

Microsoft Advertising (Bing)

For businesses seeking to explore the opportunities of Microsoft's ever-growing search engine, this is a great alternative and complement to the more prevalent digital advertising platforms – Microsoft Ads also includes placements on Yahoo, Ecosia, DuckDuckGo, and more.

Youtube Advertising

YouTube’s powerful Google-owned platform is controlled via your Google Ads. YouTube campaigns are a great starting place for you if you want to expand your audience to maximize business performance. Choosing a dedicated YouTube advertising agency to support you will ensure your campaigns deliver an excellent ROI.

PPC Audits & Consultancy

Find out how well your existing campaigns are performing and where the opportunities to optimize for growth and better performance are located in a one-off project. Our PPC Management team will dig into your account and provide recommendations on how to improve performance and scale your business.

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜
/ features

What Our PPC Services Include

Campaign Management

  • Campaign Monitoring
  • Optimized Ad Copy
  • Ad/Image Testing
  • Quality Score Improvement
  • Bid & Budget Management
  • Conversion Focused Optimization

Superior Targeting

  • Data-Driven Keyword Lists
  • Competitor Research
  • Audience Segments
  • Geographic Targeting
  • Negative Keyword Lists
  • Remarketing Campaigns

Reporting & Analytics

  • Direct Access to Your Account
  • Campaign, AdGroup, Keyword Reports
  • Google Analytics Integration
  • Call Tracking Solutions
  • Analytics Goal Verification
  • Best-in-Class Customer Service
/ why work with us

What to Expect With Your PPC Campaign.

Experts dedicated to your business
Our paid search advertising agency has the experience, know-how, and ongoing learning to tackle online market challenges and meet business objectives across various industries, including yours.
Performance & Transparency
We strive to continuously earn your business – and your trust – through transparent communication, consistency, and results. Every single month.
Straightforward pricing, no hidden fees
Just like we keep our strategies, our management costs are to the point and match the cost-effectiveness your business seeks.
Month-to-month, no contracts
We pride ourselves in providing top-notch services with transparent and fixed pricing without surprises or long-term contracts. Not happy with our service? Cancel anytime. 

Results Generated for Paid Search Clients.

We can keep you ahead in the ever-changing advertising industry so that you don’t have to worry. We want you to be our next client success story!

  • 35% Increase in Conversions
  • 210% Increase in Conversions
  • 125% (ROAS) Return on Ad Spend
View More Success Stories ➜
/ Customized approach

Our approach to PPC campaigns.

Paid Search

We carefully tailor your search ads to capture the attention of your target audience. We use precise keyword selection and optimization relevant to your business.

Display Ads

Our strategic placement of visually appealing ads can target potential customers wherever they are online, enhancing your brand’s visibility and engagement.

Video Ads

Video ads are hosted on YouTube and play mainly on YouTube. These ads are best for promoting video content or reaching highly engaged users with dynamic video ads.

Local Service Ads

We can help you dominate the local market. LSA ads offer a unique opportunity to build trust through Google’s verification, attracting more qualified leads directly to your service.

Shopping Ads

Shopping ads are designed to showcase your products directly in the search engine. We can help your eCommerce business promote inventory and drive high-intent traffic to your store.

Performance Max

By leveraging machine learning models and automation, we can ensure your performance max ads land in front of the most qualified users over time.

Discovery Ads

Discovery Ads are an excellent option for raising brand awareness and driving traffic to your site. You pay based on impressions and clicks.

Remarketing Ads

We create personalized ad experiences through targeted remarketing that encourage visitors to complete their journey, turning browsers into buyers.  

Landing Pages

We design compelling, conversion-optimized landing pages that align with your ad campaigns and resonate with your audience, ensuring a higher conversion rate.

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜

Free Consultation

Book Strategy Call ➜
/ trusted partners

On-going PPC Campaign Optimization

We’ll never just “set it and forget it.” Our PPC team constantly analyzes your campaign data to make informed strategic tweaks to your campaign for ongoing improvement and to achieve your target cost per acquisition.

Consistent Ad Testing

Your ads are regularly tested to ensure your ad budget is being used as effectively as possible

Reacting to Trends

By analyzing trends, we take advantage of market behavior and increase ROI with adaptive targeting and retargeting.

Keyword Performance Monitoring

Lower your CPC with ads that adapt to changing keyword performance.

"

How we helped Scrap City generate a 275% Improvement in Return on Ad Spend.

Scrap City had extremely aggressive growth goals. Their business was expanding, and they needed marketing experts to help them become local market leaders.

Their PPC partner had to be able to recommend strategies and tactics to launch paid search campaigns across hundreds of markets and campaign for ongoing improvement, recommendations, and optimization of these campaigns. But most importantly, it had to be done cost-effectively!

/ FAQ's

Have questions? We can help.

Have questions?
We can help.

How long does it take to launch Paid Ads campaign?

With sufficient information in hand, we will begin the ads development and keyword analysis process and have the ads campaign in place within 1 to 2 weeks. Speak to our Pay Search Advertising team for a quote.

Where do Paid Search advertisements appear?

It appears at the top of the search result engine pages (SERPs). Paid Search Ads is the first thing a searcher sees on both mobile and desktop searches before any organic results. Additionally, text, graphics, and even video can be used in Paid Search Ads. Other than SERPs, YouTube ads are another great opportunity for Paid Search Ads.

How do you measure the results of your marketing efforts?

1111 Media Group was built on transparency and performance. All of our clients get access to monthly reports that outline major KPIs and performance.
